_comment: NPC: Heng Yue Sect Recruiter (恒岳派招弟子). Phase A.6 (PA-6) — the Day 3 aptitude-test ceremony recruiter. A low-realm cultivator dispatched by the Heng Yue Sect to conduct the annual recruitment drive through the mortal villages of Zhao Country. Spawns near the player on Day 3 of the mortal origin via AptitudeTestCeremonyEvent. Right-clicked by the player via AptitudeTestCeremonyHandler to run the aptitude test and call MortalOriginHandler.completeMortalOrigin(). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.4: the Day 3 trigger is the BASE PATH; per the Opportunity Engine philosophy, the player can also deviate (early discovery on the road toward Heng Yue Mountain — future v2 work, NOT in PA-6 scope). Prime Directive: Reality is objective — this recruiter exists in the world independent of the player's perception.
name: Heng Yue Sect Recruiter
cultivation: Qi Condensation 3 (low-realm cultivator sent to test mortals)
relationship_to_wanglin: incidental — does not personally know Wang Lin; one of many low-realm outer-sect functionaries the Heng Yue Sect dispatches annually

perception_tiers.mortal: A figure in gray robes. His gaze is heavy, appraising.
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: A Qi Condensation cultivator of the Heng Yue Sect. Outer-sect functionary, here on a recruitment drive.
perception_tiers.foundation: Qi Condensation 3, late stage. Bored by mortal villages. Will return to the sect by sundown.
perception_tiers.core_formation: Low-realm recruiter. Carries a jade testing stone and a stack of outer-disciple tokens. No threat.

note: Phase A.6 (PA-6) ceremony recruiter. Spawns near the player on Day 3 of the mortal origin (AptitudeTestCeremonyEvent). Right-click via AptitudeTestCeremonyHandler runs the aptitude test sequence and calls MortalOriginHandler.completeMortalOrigin() to unlock cultivation. Recruiter is force-configured in Java (character_id, displayName, cultivationRealm, max_hp) so the entity is properly identified even if this JSON file is not yet registered in npcs/_index.json (TODO for follow-up subagent). Recruiter respawns at next dawn if killed before the player completes the test (LivingDeathEvent → CeremonyScheduler.markRecruiterDied → AptitudeTestCeremonyEvent spawn-at-dawn logic).

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: You. Come here. Let me test your spiritual root.
The Heng Yue Sect accepts disciples once a year. Today is your chance — don't waste it.
Place your hand on this testing stone. If your aptitude is sufficient, you will join the outer sect.

desires.what: Order someone to gather village children for the aptitude test
desires.why: The recruiter has a duty to test every eligible child. Per his NPC description and sect_tasks, he actively gathers children. This is not a quest — it is a cultivator issuing an order to mortals who must obey.
desires.source: EXPLICIT: Derived from npc_heng_yue_recruiter sect_tasks 'gather_village_children'. The recruiter needs every child tested.
desires.line: I need every child between twelve and sixteen brought to the village square. The test will not wait. Tell the Wang, Zhou, and Zhang families.

desires.what: Curtly dismiss someone who failed the aptitude test or is too young
desires.why: Most mortals have no spiritual root. The recruiter has seen this hundreds of times. He is indifferent (per personality) — not cruel, but not encouraging either. This is how the world works: most people cannot cultivate.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1 — the aptitude test is a pivotal moment. The recruiter's indifference is canonical. He does not give hope where there is none.
desires.line: No spiritual root. You will live a mortal life. That is not a curse — it is the natural state of most people. Go home.

desires.what: Ask the village elder which children are of testing age this year
desires.why: A dutiful recruiter checks with the local authority before testing. This is NPC→NPC initiation. The recruiter needs to know how many candidates to expect.
desires.source: INFERRED: A sect recruiter would coordinate with village leadership. This is standard operational behavior.
desires.line: How many children between twelve and sixteen in the village this year? I need names before I begin testing.

desires.what: Actively recruit a child who shows potential during the aptitude test
desires.why: The recruiter's primary duty is finding disciples for Heng Yue Sect. Per Art XXXI.1: RecruitmentEngine — 'Join me. Or I will join against you.' A Qi Condensation 3 cultivator represents a path out of poverty for village mortals. The recruiter is indifferent (personality) but not blind to talent. This fires when the player has been tested and shows spiritual root potential.
desires.source: EXPLICIT: RI Ch.1 — the Heng Yue recruiter conducts the aptitude test and accepts those with spiritual roots. Canon line: 'If your aptitude is sufficient, you will join the outer sect.' The recruitment desire makes the recruiter INITIATE toward a promising candidate rather than waiting to be asked.
desires.line: You have spiritual root. Not strong, but present. The Heng Yue Sect accepts disciples once a year. Think carefully — this is your only chance to leave this mortal village behind.

sect_tasks.description: The Heng Yue recruiter gestures to a pale jade stone on the table: 'Place your hand here. If you have any spiritual root at all, the stone will glow. This is your only chance to leave this mortal village.'
The recruiter narrows his eyes: 'I need every child in this village between twelve and sixteen brought to the square. The test will not wait. Go tell the Wang, Zhou, and Zhang families.'
